title: Banana Of Undying (Simplistic)
description: This resource pack makes the totem of undying a simple VERY realistic banana. U should download this. :3
body: This is the Banana Of Undying. A very simple texture pack that makes the Totem Of Undying a banana. I recommend to use this if you dont care about the borders only the front! Made for memes and if you like/love bananas. Bye and have a great day!
